risk_if_not_implemented: Without Recovery Time / Point Objectives (RTO / RPO), the organization may be unable to recover from disruptions, resulting in data loss and extended downtime.

compensating_control_1.name: Contingency Plan Testing & Exercises
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct tests and/or exercises to evaluate the contingency plan's effectiveness and the organization's readiness to execute the plan.
compensating_control_1.justification: Contingency Plan Testing & Exercises (BCD-04) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of Recovery Time / Point Objectives (RTO / RPO) (BCD-01.4) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Contingency Plan Root Cause Analysis (RCA) & Lessons Learned
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct a Root Cause Analysis (RCA) and "lessons learned" activity every time the contingency plan is activated.
compensating_control_2.justification: Contingency Plan Root Cause Analysis (RCA) & Lessons Learned (BCD-05) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Recovery Time / Point Objectives (RTO / RPO) (BCD-01.4) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
